name: Pharaonic Guardian Sphinx
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>王家の守護者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファラオニックガーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スフィンクス
desc: Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each of the following effects of "Pharaonic Guardian Sphinx" once per turn. If this card is Flip Summoned: Shuffle all monsters your opponent controls into the Deck. If this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 Rock monster from your hand or Deck in face-down Defense Position.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each of the following effects of "Pharaonic Guardian Sphinx" once per turn. If this card is Flip Summoned: Shuffle all monsters your opponent controls into the Deck. If this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 Rock monster from your hand or Deck in face-down Defense Position.
eff: Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each of the following effects of "Pharaonic Guardian Sphinx" once per turn. If this card is Flip Summoned: Shuffle all monsters your opponent controls into the Deck. If this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 Rock monster from your hand or Deck in face-down Defense Position.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
Activates if destroyed by card effect
